title: Gate 6: Conflict
description: You have an emotional intelligence that knows exactly when to open up and when to protect yourself. You instinctively feel who is genuinely safe to connect with. Trust that read — it's your protection.
learningGoal: The viewer understands what Gate 6 (Conflict — Emotional wisdom in conflict navigation) means in their daily life, in plain terms.
keyPoints: You have an emotional intelligence that knows exactly when to open up and when to protect yourself.
You instinctively feel who is genuinely safe to connect with.
forbiddenClaims: a gate guarantees a talent you do not have to develop
gates rank people as better or worse
an activated gate forces a fixed behaviour

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: Gate 6: Conflict — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: Gate 6: Conflict — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: Gate 6: Conflict — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: Gate 6: Conflict — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: You have an emotional intelligence that knows exactly when to open up and when to protect yourself. You instinctively feel who is genuinely safe to connect with. Trust that read — it's your protection.
